message:
feat(demo_showcase): implement structured log stream with filtering (bd-33fe)

Enhanced LogEntry with correlation and timing fields:
- tick: monotonic simulation frame for ordering
- job_id: optional correlation with background jobs
- deployment_id: optional correlation with deployments
- Builder methods: with_tick(), with_job_id(), with_deployment_id()

Added LogStream - bounded append-only log buffer with filtering:
- filter_by_level(): minimum log level filtering
- filter_by_target()/filter_by_target_prefix(): service/component filtering
- filter_by_job()/filter_by_deployment(): correlation-based filtering
- search(): case-insensitive message text search
- filter_by_tick_range(): time-window queries
- latest(): newest-first iteration
- count_by_level(): level distribution statistics
- Automatic trimming with configurable capacity

Updated generator and simulation to use new LogEntry fields.

Closes bd-33fe, unblocks bd-32pp and bd-3m25.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -522,11 +522,14 @@ impl Generator {
         LogEntry {
             id: self.next_id(),
             timestamp: self.random_time(6),
+            tick: 0, // Initial entries are tick 0 (pre-simulation)
             level,
             target: (*target).to_string(),
             message,
             fields,
             trace_id,
+            job_id: None,        // Correlation set by simulation if needed
+            deployment_id: None, // Correlation set by simulation if needed
         }
     }
